params.prompt: Wide interior shot with a slow and smooth dolly in. Dramatic shadows crawl and shift across walls, furnishings, and architectural surfaces. Neutral white balance, balanced exposure, stable motion. Atmospheric architectural cinematography. Begin with a slow dolly in from the entry toward the patio, pausing to pan across the sofa and desk corner; linger on hand resting at the standing desk and a parent leaning slightly while looking toward patio, then continue to reveal the low coffee table and plant near the glass door. Nest, Warm, quiet, family-focused Japandi: light-filled, tactile, and deliberately minimal. Maintain believable residential scale for a 11.916666666666666 by 11.666666666666666 ft Nest. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
